qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path traversal in LocalFile source via unauthenticated HTTP API evaluate_data endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets LocalFile source path construction through the HTTP evaluate_data endpoint; it does not identify Doris target table-name validation or ALTER TABLE statement construction.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No manifest-listed final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described CocoIndex Doris target connector root cause: an unvalidated configured table name used to construct ALTER TABLE statements during target schema changes. The final qualifying finding covers an unrelated LocalFile path traversal code path.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-59g6-v3vg-f7wc describes CWE-89 in CocoIndex before 0.3.34: the Doris target connector did not validate table names before constructing ALTER TABLE statements.

path_traversal_local_file_via_http_api/vulnerability_report.json reports GET /cocoindex/api/flows/{flow}/data key[] traversal into rust/cocoindex/src/ops/sources/local_file.rs get_value and std::fs::read.

The manifest-listed final qualifying report does not describe the Doris target connector, configured table names, ALTER TABLE construction, or the advisory patch behavior of validating target table identifiers at entry point.
blockers_to_higher_tier: Tier assignment is not applicable because target_match is no_match.
